rows.label: xs33180100_MSG0010
rows.name: You've regained consciousness.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33180100_MSG0020
rows.name: You don't appear to be injured from what I can see, but[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33180100_MSG0030
rows.name: Are you okay?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33180100_MSG0040
rows.name:
Thank goodness.
Both of us being safe is a small mercy amidst this disaster.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33180100_MSG0050
rows.name:
That being said[ST:wide ]—
The situation isn't exactly looking favorable.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33180100_MSG0060
rows.name: Look.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33180100_MSG0070
rows.name: It seems Void blew us all the way out here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33180100_MSG0090
rows.name: You probably saw it back there too, but[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33180100_MSG0100
rows.name: Al was absorbed by Void along with the Ares.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33180100_MSG0101
rows.name:
We are separated from our allies,
and our Dolls crashed somewhere[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33180100_MSG0102
rows.name: We're truly backed into a corner.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33180100_JNK0103
rows.name: Hope

rows.label: xs33180100_SEL0104
rows.name: Propose that the first step should be regrouping with your allies.

rows.label: xs33180100_MSG0105
rows.name: Yes, you're exactly right.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33180100_JNK0106
rows.name: Despair

rows.label: xs33180100_SEL0107
rows.name: Look down and say that it's all over[ST:wide ]—

rows.label: xs33180100_MSG0108
rows.name: Calm down.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33180100_MSG0109
rows.name: It's too early to give up.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33180100_MSG0110
rows.name: Even for Void,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33180100_MSG0120
rows.name: activating all the cores[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33180100_MSG0125
rows.name: should require a corresponding amount of time[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33180100_MSG0230
rows.name: First, let's search the area and rendezvous with our units.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33180100_MSG0240
rows.name:
If we track the location data from their emergency beacons,
we should be able to find them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33180100_MSG0250
rows.name: Our Dolls must have crash-landed somewhere too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33180100_MSG0260
rows.name:
As a means of transportation for our search,
I'd like to recover them as quickly as possible.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33180100_MSG0270
rows.name:
Either way,
let's not panic and deal with things one step at a time.[ST:wait ]
